ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the article is originally published */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category to which the article belongs */,
  "story_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the story or topic */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the URL */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was published or aggregated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stories" (
  "story_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each story or topic */,
  "story_name" TEXT /* Name of the story or topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief summary of the story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the article (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that was engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the article */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, share, comment) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement occurred */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Weighted score based on the type of engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_engagement_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the metadata belongs to */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_metadata_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
